center.name: Pantaron Mountain Range
center.summary: Pantaron Mountain Range是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Black-headed tailorbird，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It inhabits dense undergrowth in lowland forests at elevations of up to and is non-migratory. A 2021 study of avian biodiversity near Mount Pantaron in Bukidnon found that the black-headed tailorbird, like other Philippine endemics, was absent from agricultural ecosystems but present in nearby montane forests
